text:
is a student who comes to watch the Attack Junior High School play.

Appearance

Furlan has gray eyes and dirty-blond hair, and some bangs hang between his eyes. He wears a gray-colored suit with a blue neck tie.

Story

Furlan watches the Attack Junior High School play with Isabel Magnolia.

Relationships

Isabel Magnolia - The two appear to be friends to an unknown extent.
